allow: Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./scripts/books-data.json''\); console.log\(''Totale libri:'', d.length\); const withIsbn = d.filter\(b => b.isbn !== null\).length; const withAll = d.filter\(b => b.title && b.author && b.price && b.cover && b.publisher && b.year\).length; console.log\(''Con ISBN:'', withIsbn\); console.log\(''Con tutti i campi \(escluso ISBN\):'', withAll\); console.log\(''Con TUTTI i campi \(incluso ISBN\):'', d.filter\(b => b.title && b.author && b.price && b.cover && b.isbn && b.publisher && b.year\).length\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./scripts/books-data.json''\); console.log\(''Totale libri:'', d.length\); const withIsbn = d.filter\(b => b.isbn != null\).length; console.log\(''Con ISBN:'', withIsbn\); const withAll = d.filter\(b => b.title && b.author && b.price && b.cover && b.publisher && b.year\).length; console.log\(''Con tutti i campi \(escluso ISBN\):'', withAll\);")

Bash(node -e "var d = require\(''./scripts/books-data.json''\); console.log\(''Total:'', d.length\); console.log\(''With ISBN:'', d.filter\(function\(b\){return b.isbn}\).length\); console.log\(''With publisher:'', d.filter\(function\(b\){return b.publisher}\).length\);")
